nature: protocol conformance only, completed before any sealed outcome was inspected; no scientific threshold, feature family, task set, k, ranking, token accounting, counterfactual cap, or hypothesis changed

corrections.tool_verification: the evaluator previously recorded routed/tool success unconditionally; it now constructs the deterministic tool result as a pure function of the private task and passes it through the same frozen task_verdict used at capture — a routed arm records tool success only on verifier pass, and any missing task, unsupported family, undecided verdict, or verifier failure raises an evaluation blocker that aborts before hypotheses are opened
corrections.preflight: before scoring: exactly 192 unique task and row ids with identical id sets; sealed task-file sha256 must equal the manifest-pinned value; per-row schema checks (cap verdicts present, prefix-feature steps limited to 128/256/384, finite feature values, output length within the 2048 ceiling)
corrections.random_policy_rng: count-matched-random routing now uses a dedicated frozen RNG (RANDOM_POLICY_SEED = 36036), independent of bootstrap RNG consumption; bootstrap unchanged at 10000 resamples, seed 36036

tests: tests/test_m36t_evaluate.py — 14 synthetic-only conformance tests covering all four families, verifier acceptance and rejection, duplicate/missing ids, sha mismatch, ceiling breach, deterministic count-matched random routing, and the impossibility of a tool result overwriting a verified-correct answer with failure
evaluator_run_status: not yet run; sealed capture still in progress
